mapper.delete: delete from salegoods where UID=#{UID} and GID=#{marketGoods.GID}
mapper.select: select marketgoods.GID,Name,Kind,Price,Number,marketgoods.Image,marketgoods.Comment, marketgoods.Status,marketgoods.DeliveryMode,marketgoods.PickupLocation, marketgoods.CampusOnly,marketgoods.ReviewNote,marketgoods.PublishedAt from salegoods,marketgoods where UID=#{UID} and marketgoods.GID=salegoods.GID
select UID from salegoods where GID = #{GID}
